hook: Ghosting hurts partly because uncertainty is harder on the mind than a clear no.
body: Ambiguity invites self-doubt, overanalysis, and false hope long after the interaction has already ended.

hook: Many men burn energy trying to decode silence instead of accepting the information silence already contains.
body: Clarity is not always available, but your interpretation can still become clearer.

hook: Clarity is not always available, but your interpretation can still become clearer.
body: If someone disappears after warmth and then never repairs the break, that absence is its own answer.

body: Give one reasonable follow-up if needed, then let a lack of response close the loop for you.
